title: SpectralStage
description: Bounded exploratory stage routing source heat through declared absorber, cavity, mediator, and emitter concepts using explicit coefficients and losses. Governed by model-extension-2-spec-v0.2.1 §11. Output-driving fields: capture_efficiency_fraction, band_match_score, geometry_coupling_score, mediator_transfer_score, regeneration_effectiveness, thermal_loss_fraction, work_input_w, external_heat_input_w, storage_drawdown_w, source_capture_fraction_override. Metadata-only (for numeric): notes[], maturity_class, confidence_class.

spectral_stage_id.description: Deterministic stage identifier. Must be stable for given ordered inputs per spec §16.3.

enabled.description: Whether this stage participates in runtime computation. Disabled stages are serialized but skipped.

source_zone_ref.description: Reference ID of the thermal zone providing source heat. Required for valid stage per §15.1.

target_zone_ref.description: Reference ID of the thermal zone receiving transferred heat. Required for valid stage per §15.1.

source_spectral_profile_ref.description: Reference to catalog source spectral profile ID or null if derived profile is used. Required for valid stage per §15.1.

absorber_family_ref.description: Reference to catalog absorber family ID. Required for valid stage per §15.1.

emitter_family_ref.description: Reference to catalog emitter family ID. Required for valid stage per §15.1.

cavity_geometry_ref.description: Reference to catalog cavity geometry ID. Required for valid stage per §15.1.

mediator_family_ref.description: Reference to catalog mediator family ID. Required for valid stage per §15.1.

capture_efficiency_fraction.description: Overall stage capture efficiency [dimensionless, 0–1]. Output-driving per §11.6. Constraint: 0 <= value <= 1 per §11.4.

band_match_score.description: Normalized source-to-absorber band overlap score [dimensionless, 0–1]. Output-driving per §11.6. Computed helper per §13.4. Constraint: 0 <= value <= 1 per §11.4. Must be serialized explicitly per §11.5.

geometry_coupling_score.description: Normalized geometry coupling effectiveness score [dimensionless, 0–1]. Output-driving per §11.6. Computed helper per §13.5. Constraint: 0 <= value <= 1 per §11.4. Must be serialized explicitly per §11.5.

mediator_transfer_score.description: Normalized mediator transfer effectiveness score [dimensionless, 0–1]. Output-driving per §11.6. Computed helper per §13.6. Constraint: 0 <= value <= 1 per §11.4. Must be serialized explicitly per §11.5.

regeneration_effectiveness.description: Regenerative cycle effectiveness [dimensionless, 0–1]. Output-driving per §11.6. Constraint: 0 <= value <= 1 per §11.4.

thermal_loss_fraction.description: Fractional thermal loss through stage [dimensionless, 0 <= value < 1]. Output-driving per §11.6. Constraint: 0 <= value < 1 per §11.4.

work_input_w.description: External work input to stage [W]. Output-driving per §11.6. Constraint: >= 0 per §11.4. No free-lunch rule: must be declared explicitly per §3.4.

external_heat_input_w.description: External thermal input to stage from non-source path [W]. Output-driving per §11.6. Constraint: >= 0 per §11.4. No free-lunch rule: must be declared explicitly per §3.4.

storage_drawdown_w.description: Storage discharge contributing to stage [W]. Output-driving per §11.6. Constraint: >= 0 per §11.4. No free-lunch rule: must be declared explicitly per §3.4.

source_capture_fraction_override.description: Override for source capture fraction [dimensionless, 0–1] or null to use capture_efficiency_fraction. Output-driving per §11.6 and §13.2. Constraint: 0 <= value <= 1 per §11.4.

notes.description: Operator-visible notes. Metadata-only (for numeric outputs) per §11.6. Still affect warnings.

maturity_class.description: Technology maturity class per spec §12.2. Metadata-only for numeric effect per §11.6; still affects warnings.

confidence_class.description: Confidence class per spec §12.3. Metadata-only for numeric effect per §11.6; still affects warnings.

research_required.description: True if provenance_class is placeholder or hypothesis_only per spec §12.5.
